programme.title: Connect with Tech
programme.desc: When rain prevents Darwin and Newts from holding a ‘show and tell' day, they use the Internet to connect with their forest whanau remotely.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Rafa
programme.desc: Meet the Loro Parque Foundation Scientific Director - Rafa, also known as the ‘Birdman of Loro Parque'. He wears the badge with pride and every day he surrounds himself with all things ornithological - from parrots and puffins to penguins.

programme.title: Gorilla Foot
programme.desc: Ubongo, the gorilla, has a massive cut on his foot. But how do you treat a 400-pound gorilla with a sore foot? And have you ever seen a sloth take a shower? Hugo, the sloth, will draw back the shower curtain and reveal all.

programme.title: The Fog Mystery
programme.desc: Addison and Alex are filming a class-project documentary about a “typical day in Ayrton Park” – but things quickly become anything but typical when a mysterious fog envelops the entire downtown area.

programme.title: Pizza Box
programme.desc: After a nice hearty meal, let's get DIY-ing with Hepi and Briko.

programme.title: Trip to Indonesia
programme.desc: Zoe makes a gift for her friend Noa, puzzling Milo-she's given Noa gifts before! Zoe says she has many friends named Noa. Alim suggests it's because they're the eldest. To show how names relate to birth order, he takes them to Bali, where many people are named Wayan

programme.title: Art of the Steal
programme.desc: Anabella is taking a special art class at an art museum. She manages to produce a near perfect copy of The Starry Night, by Vincent Van Gogh. But soon after the end of the class, a masterpiece goes missing. How can the team prove that Anabella is innocent?

programme.title: Bouncing and Bending Light
programme.desc: What is the difference between reflection and refraction? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of light. Have hands-on fun by mixing oil and water, and get to know Zhang Heng, a great polymath, who figured out the Moon reflects light like a mirror.

programme.title: Building Fortified Castles
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, castles are built to protect their residents from danger. Lord Roach wants to have his castle fitted with every single type of defense system. Howle r- his architect, loves the idea. But there is something that may ruin the construction process.

programme.title: Art of the Steal
programme.desc: Anabella is taking a special art class at an art museum. She manages to produce a near perfect copy of The Starry Night, by Vincent Van Gogh. But soon after the end of the class, a masterpiece goes missing. How can the team prove that Anabella is innocent?

programme.title: Rise Up!
programme.desc: Eric learns that yeast is used to make bread rise and that it produces gases when it feeds on sugar. He does an experiment with a balloon to show how this works.

programme.title: Rise Up!
programme.desc: Eric learns that yeast is used to make bread rise and that it produces gases when it feeds on sugar. He does an experiment with a balloon to show how this works.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met... A Lighthouse
programme.desc: Henry meets a friendly Lighthouse. Lighthouse needs to light the way for a small boat as it heads towards the shore but his bulb has gone.

programme.title: Otter
programme.desc: Grey gives Red a present but can't believe her ears when he decides to exercise patience and not open it until after the show. Fleabag and Plop try their hand at some otter-based poetry. And Orla And Meabh embark on the most dangerous mission yet.

programme.title: Rise Up!
programme.desc: Eric learns that yeast is used to make bread rise and that it produces gases when it feeds on sugar. He does an experiment with a balloon to show how this works.

programme.title: International Rivalry
programme.desc: Will captain Emily be fit enough to skate with her team, and what is the surprise in store for Afton? Meanwhile, back in Nottingham, young figure skater Solomon needs to nail his axels if he wants to impress Coach Tamara.

programme.title: Health Check-ups
programme.desc: Jamie and Nyatepe are helping vet Scott examine poorly dog Isla. Josh and Molly visit a newborn donkey. And alpacas are keeping Robyn and Bonte on their toes.

programme.title: Reflecting on Mirror Writing
programme.desc: Mirror, mirror on the wall, can you read Eric's handwriting at all? In this episode Eric explores mirror writing: a reversed way of writing seen on for instance ambulances, where the word 'AMBULANCE' is often written in a mirrored way.

programme.title: Super Shape!
programme.desc: Eric learns why the triangle is such an important shape for building. He builds a bridge made of straws that is so strong that he can balance several books on it.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Rafa
programme.desc: Meet the Loro Parque Foundation Scientific Director - Rafa, also known as the ‘Birdman of Loro Parque'. He wears the badge with pride and every day he surrounds himself with all things ornithological - from parrots and puffins to penguins.

programme.title: Pizza Box

programme.title: Pacific North West
programme.desc: Explored Seattle: Pike Place Market (est. 1907), IFly's indoor wind tunnel, and Museum of Flight Aviation with a thrilling jet simulator ride. A day filled with history, adventure, and aviation excitement!

programme.title: Stars in a Jar
programme.desc: Eric learns constellations are groups of stars and that they often have shapes that look like animals, objects, or even people. He makes a lantern that can project the constellation Ursa Major, also known as the Great Bear because it looks like a big bear in the sky.

programme.title: Stars in a Jar
programme.desc: Eric learns constellations are groups of stars and that they often have shapes that look like animals, objects, or even people. He makes a lantern that can project the constellation Ursa Major, also known as the Great Bear because it looks like a big bear in the sky.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met... A Rooster
programme.desc: Henry meets a friendly Rooster. Rooster needs to wake up the farmer so he can feed the animals but he has a sore throat and can't crow.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met... A Cow
programme.desc: Henry meets a friendly Cow and learns all about where milk comes from.

programme.title: The Periodic Table
programme.desc: How does the Periodic Table work? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of chemistry. Have hands-on fun by decoding a secret message on a blank piece of paper, and get to know Dmitri Mendeleev, a chemist and inventor – the father of the Periodic Table.

programme.title: Stars in a Jar
programme.desc: Eric learns constellations are groups of stars and that they often have shapes that look like animals, objects, or even people. He makes a lantern that can project the constellation Ursa Major, also known as the Great Bear because it looks like a big bear in the sky.

programme.title: Super Shape!
programme.desc: Eric learns why the triangle is such an important shape for building. He builds a bridge made of straws that is so strong that he can balance several books on it.

programme.title: From Zero to Hero
programme.desc: What's the most powerful number in the universe? One million? One billion? One trillion? No, it's zero! In this episode we explain why by focusing on the role of zero as a placeholder for large numbers.

programme.title: Stars in a Jar
programme.desc: Eric learns constellations are groups of stars and that they often have shapes that look like animals, objects, or even people. He makes a lantern that can project the constellation Ursa Major, also known as the Great Bear because it looks like a big bear in the sky.

programme.title: Building Fortified Castles
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, castles are built to protect their residents from danger. Lord Roach wants to have his castle fitted with every single type of defense system. Howle r- his architect, loves the idea. But there is something that may ruin the construction process.

programme.title: Gorilla Foot
programme.desc: Ubongo, the gorilla, has a massive cut on his foot. But how do you treat a 400-pound gorilla with a sore foot? And have you ever seen a sloth take a shower? Hugo, the sloth, will draw back the shower curtain and reveal all.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Rafa
programme.desc: Meet the Loro Parque Foundation Scientific Director - Rafa, also known as the ‘Birdman of Loro Parque'. He wears the badge with pride and every day he surrounds himself with all things ornithological - from parrots and puffins to penguins.

programme.title: Gorilla Foot
programme.desc: Ubongo, the gorilla, has a massive cut on his foot. But how do you treat a 400-pound gorilla with a sore foot? And have you ever seen a sloth take a shower? Hugo, the sloth, will draw back the shower curtain and reveal all.

programme.title: Rise Up!
programme.desc: Eric learns that yeast is used to make bread rise and that it produces gases when it feeds on sugar. He does an experiment with a balloon to show how this works.

programme.title: Stars in a Jar
programme.desc: Eric learns constellations are groups of stars and that they often have shapes that look like animals, objects, or even people. He makes a lantern that can project the constellation Ursa Major, also known as the Great Bear because it looks like a big bear in the sky.

programme.title: Reflecting on Mirror Writing
programme.desc: Mirror, mirror on the wall, can you read Eric's handwriting at all? In this episode Eric explores mirror writing: a reversed way of writing seen on for instance ambulances, where the word 'AMBULANCE' is often written in a mirrored way.

programme.desc: Eric learns why the triangle is such an important shape for building. He builds a bridge made of straws that is so strong that he can balance several books on it.

programme.title: E104 - Beck's Big Break
programme.desc: Tori accidentally gets Beck fired from a small role in a movie, then must figure out a way to get him his job back. Meanwhile, Robbie suffers frightening nightmares about his best friend Rex.

programme.title: E101 - Jade the Juggler / Parcel Chase
programme.desc: Jade tries to help too many people and ends up causing chaos in the process! // The Twins ask the Marsupilamis to wait for an important parcel, but they miss it, so try and retrieve it from the depot.

programme.title: E409 - In a Space Pickle / Stare Wars
programme.desc: Quasar uses Patrick to communicate with the dumbest aliens in the universe. // Patrick and GrandPat have a staring contest to compete for the last lick of a baking spoon.

programme.title: E120 - Miles Has Visions
programme.desc: When AWOL starts seeing visions of the future right before they happen, Captain Man believes it must be the work of Swellview's leading time-crime villain, The Time Jerker.

programme.title: E105 - Mar-Snoop / Canteen Carnage
programme.desc: On her quest to get her own Marsupilami, Bibi encounters a Jaguar which scares her enough to give up the hunt. // Marcel gets a job as the school chef after Jade causes the usual one to quit.

programme.title: E210 - Dylan and Rebecca's Cleve-Land-Land Adventure
programme.desc: The Alexanders get another visit from Young Dylan, whose cousin Rebecca joins Sadie at the launch event for the new version of their favorite video game, while Dylan enlists Lay Lay to help get his music on the game soundtrack.

programme.title: E1001 - Summer Camp: The Grate Outdoors / Summer Camp: Don't Lose Your Cool
programme.desc: At Camp Mastodon, Lynn pushes an overly-cautious Lisa to become more adventurous. // When Lori learns her Camp Mastodon campers think she's uncool, she tries to impress them by breaking the rules.

programme.title: E123 - One of the Boys / A Tattler’s Tale
programme.desc: Lincoln wishes he had ten brothers instead of ten sisters, and Lisa gives him a glimpse into that reality. // Lola wants to be a part of the siblings' secrets club, but they won't let her in because she's a 'tattle tale'.

programme.title: E16 - 開啟番外篇中秋團員宴特輯 (下)
programme.desc: 聚焦18名來自全國一線「主廚」通過不同對戰形式挑戰各類美食命題，加深著觀眾對廚師技能、主廚職業、飲食文化的多重認知。邀請到四位餐飲界頂級大師董振祥、周曉燕、譚綺文、劉一帆，以及代表食客和經營餐飲店的演員袁弘組成評委團，從不同的角度對主廚創作進行品評，見證主廚形象的誕生。

programme.title: E44
programme.desc: 突破傳統的交友方式，24位單身女生以亮燈和滅燈方式來決定男嘉賓去留，通過「愛之初體驗」、「愛之再判斷」、「愛之終決選」、「男生權利」等決定男女嘉賓的速配成功。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 圍繞「兼職女王」辛桐與四海集團繼承人聞裴安展開，辛桐為替閨蜜搞砸相親而錯誤結識聞裴安，聞裴安因家族逼婚僱傭辛桐假扮契約情侶，二人由此開啟與戀愛監察特工斗智斗勇的爆笑同居之旅。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 圍繞「兼職女王」辛桐與四海集團繼承人聞裴安展開，辛桐為替閨蜜搞砸相親而錯誤結識聞裴安，聞裴安因家族逼婚僱傭辛桐假扮契約情侶，二人由此開啟與戀愛監察特工斗智斗勇的爆笑同居之旅。

programme.title: E17 - 「勵志男神」登場
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》全新改版，24位女嘉賓分為心動區和觀察區，男嘉賓暫不亮相，在「第二現場」與女嘉賓隔空對話。男女嘉賓通過雙向選擇，決定兩人能否成功牽手。

programme.desc: 突破傳統的交友方式，24位單身女生以亮燈和滅燈方式來決定男嘉賓去留，通過「愛之初體驗」、「愛之再判斷」、「愛之終決選」、「男生權利」等決定男女嘉賓的速配成功。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 圍繞「兼職女王」辛桐與四海集團繼承人聞裴安展開，辛桐為替閨蜜搞砸相親而錯誤結識聞裴安，聞裴安因家族逼婚僱傭辛桐假扮契約情侶，二人由此開啟與戀愛監察特工斗智斗勇的爆笑同居之旅。

programme.title: When Mudslides Threaten Mountain Villages
programme.desc: In the Alps, villages are increasingly threatened by flows of mud and debris. The problem reached new heights in 2025, when the Swiss mountain village of Blatten was nearly completely buried by a huge avalanche.

programme.title: One Second
programme.desc: China during the Cultural Revolution. A prisoner escapes from a labour camp. He risks everything in his search for a stolen film reel in which his long-lost daughter appears – for one second. Soon he encounters the thief, an orphaned girl haunted by her own terrible loss.

programme.desc: NCIS works with the CIA to discover what secrets are being kept by Captain Butler, an elderly former spy with dementia.

programme.title: E6 - Knight And Day
programme.desc: Things become tense when Knight is assigned to protect his wife after the home of a high-level defense contractor is attacked.

programme.title: E88
programme.desc: Emmy and Grammy Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon brings his unique high-energy comedy to the storied 60-year NBC franchise with his welcoming interview style, love of audience participation, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches.

programme.title: E2 - House Hunting Hermit Crabs

programme.title: E3 - The Misfit Comes of Age
programme.desc: If the tiny Nsefu pride is to survive, the teen Misfit and his older brother must quickly perfect their hunting skills. Trek into enemy territory as the lions face dominant rivals and a powerful hyena clan in the search for prey.

programme.title: E3 - The Misfit Comes of Age

programme.title: E4 - India & Sri Lanka's Deadly Mother's Day

programme.title: E6 - Extreme
programme.desc: Learn how plants and animals tough it out in some of the driest terrain Earth has to offer. Run across thirsty trees that act as elephant signposts, see insects team up with plants for a chance at life, and get insight into natural chemical warfare.

programme.title: E2 - Living on the Edge
programme.desc: The plains and woodlands of the Luangwa Valley are the wildest and most merciless of all neighborhoods where duels between predator and prey are played out both day and night. For the animals that call this home, it’s a daily battle to stay alive.

programme.title: E7 - Cambodia: Hidden Refuges
programme.desc: Bisected by the Mekong’s mighty waters, Cambodia is defined by its relationship to this great river. See why the country is a biodiversity hot spot and explore the secret refuges of animal populations that survive in its untouched natural habitats.

programme.title: E6 - Episode 6

programme.title: E6 - Extreme

programme.title: E1 - The Young Up-Start
programme.desc: Explore the lush treed cityscape where fluffy male Matnoor rules over the 30-member-strong Street Troop with an iron fist. Then meet Aarav, the old alpha who oversees the wilder Hill Troop. Which will up-and-comer Loci challenge for the crown?

programme.title: E2 - The Grass is Greener
programme.desc: Go on a junk-food-fuelled urban holiday with the Street Troop, then watch the Hill Troop’s invasion of their turf turn sour. Monitor the Sisterhood’s plot to kidnap Sara’s baby before newly minted alpha Loci discovers his old rival is back in town.

programme.title: E4 - Surprise...It's Restaurant Wars
programme.desc: In a massive twist, Padma’s favorite challenge Restaurant Wars comes early this year, but before the chefs gear up for battle, they must first duke it out in an amuse bouche-based Quickfire for Top Chef alum turned James Beard Award winning chefs: Karen Akunowicz and Nina Compton. Then, the gauntlet has been thrown and with twelve chefs remaining, three restaurants will be battling for victory. James Beard Award winning restaurateur Caroline Styne joins as the guest judge along with Nilou Motamed. And if this unexpected chaos isn’t enough, Tom leaves the Chefs breathless with an announcement that will change the course of the competition.

programme.title: Truth Or Fake[Live]
programme.desc: In our fast-moving challenging world it is of fundamental importance to sort what's true from what's fake online. The Truth or Fake is a short program designed to alert everyone to the dangers of fake news. The hosts emphasize that media literacy is a key part of the broad fight against disinformation.

programme.title: Focus[Live]
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: Eye On Africa[Live]
programme.desc: Join Georja Calvin-Smith for all the news from Africa and the Maghreb, together with France 24's correspondents and guests of the show. Eye on Africa is on every week day twice a day. Have a look at African life and find out what is going on there in the sphere of politics, health care, business. Get to know how global affairs influence its top events and be the first to experience its colorful exotic culture.

programme.title: Eye On Africa
programme.desc: Join Georja Calvin-Smith for all the news from Africa and the Maghreb, together with France 24's correspondents and guests of the show. Eye on Africa is on every week day twice a day. Have a look at African life and find out what is going on there in the sphere of politics, health care, business. Get to know how global affairs influence its top events and be the first to experience its colorful exotic culture.

programme.desc: Offering tips on growing flowers and greens through an animated short story.

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.desc: An easy-to-do exercise program for everyone from children to the elderly.

programme.title: German In A Happy Mood
programme.desc: Let's learn simple and easy-to-remember phrases, looking at a modern Europe that cherishes its history and traditions while pursuing a lifestyle that fits its stature. Furthermore, we explore tips for “happiness” and various forms of “joy” through the unique European way of thinking and values behind their languages and lifestyles.

programme.title: E76
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan's first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E111 - The Crew & Marshall Build A Fire Station
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build Builder Cove's first ever Fire Station, complete with an inspection from Paw Patrol's Marshall! But when Speed Meister's sneaky sabotage traps Marshall's Fire Truck, the pups work together to put out a fire construction-style.

programme.title: E603 - Dino Derby
programme.desc: Today, dinosaur Blaze is teaming up with his prehistoric pal Zeg to compete in... the Dino Derby! But will this dino duo have what it takes to outrace the rest and become Dino Derby champions?

programme.title: E403 - Captain Dora / Bruno And The Bunny Boyz
programme.desc: Dora and Boots track down the Pirate Piggies' ship and save it from a kraken! // Dora and Boots help Bruno the Bunny find his own special dance moves in time to perform with his favorite band, the Bunny Boyz!

programme.title: E112 - Costume Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile dresses as Super Crocodile for his first Halloween, and tries to live up to his new identity.

programme.title: E104 - The Crew Builds A Playground / The Crew Fixes A Roof
programme.desc: After Speed Meister builds an unsafe playground, the Rubble & Crew get creative and build a whole new one with old materials. // The town Chili Cookaroo is threatened when City Hall's roof starts to cave in! Luckily, the pups know just how to fix it.

programme.title: E105 - The Crew Builds A Car Wash / The Crew Plans Grandpa Day
programme.desc: Mayor Greatway needs her muddy motorcycle cleaned fast! Wheeler and the pups jump into action to build a solution before the big race. // It's Grandpa Gravel's special day! But when the pups are needed, they have to change their Grandpa Day plans.

programme.title: E715 - The Zoo
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle takes the children on a trip to the Zoo where they get a tour from the zookeepers; Mr Lion, Mrs Crocodile and Mr Giraffe!

programme.title: E720 - Nursery Rhymes
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle and the playgroup are sharing their best nursery rhymes with each other.

programme.title: E721 - Digger World
programme.desc: Mummy and Daddy Pig, Peppa and George have a wonderful day with Mr. Potato at Digger World!

programme.title: E112 - Costume Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile dresses as Super Crocodile for his first Halloween, and tries to live up to his new identity.

programme.title: E111 - The Crew & Marshall Build A Fire Station
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build Builder Cove's first ever Fire Station, complete with an inspection from Paw Patrol's Marshall! But when Speed Meister's sneaky sabotage traps Marshall's Fire Truck, the pups work together to put out a fire construction-style.

programme.title: E1211 - Pups Save A Goldfish / Pups Save A Flying Florist
programme.desc: Uncle Otis accidentally slips and tosses Julia and Julius's new goldfish, Marigold, into the river. // When Ms. Marjorie and Mr. Park don wingsuits to see a rare flower, a flying squirrel sends them off course!

programme.title: E112 - Costume Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile dresses as Super Crocodile for his first Halloween, and tries to live up to his new identity.

programme.title: E237 - Rebecca Rabbit
programme.desc: Peppa and George are going to Rebecca Rabbit's house today. It is a bit different to Peppa's house; it is inside a hill, with tunnels instead of stairs. They enjoy playing rabbits and everyone is surprised when George discovers he likes carrots!

programme.title: E231 - The Cycle Ride
programme.desc: Peppa and her family are going for a day's cycle ride. Peppa loves cycling downhill but she's not so keen on peddling uphill. So, when the family meet all of Peppa's friends and decide to have a race, Peppa insists it should be a down hill race.

programme.title: E112 - Plant Sitter Croc
programme.desc: Daisy and Mr. Crocodile promise to take care of Mrs. Flores' prized plant, but keep putting it off for 'later'.

programme.title: E112 - Costume Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile dresses as Super Crocodile for his first Halloween, and tries to live up to his new identity.

programme.title: E106 - The Crew Builds A Skate Park / The Crew Builds A Tunnel
programme.desc: The Crew has a mishap while building a skatepark. // The Crew helps a pop star get her tour bus to town.

programme.title: E603 - Pups Save A Melon Festival / Pups Save A Cow
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger's plan to win the giant melon contest goes off the rails when his 'melon' bounces away, causing chaos all over town! // When Farmer Al's truck gets stuck on a broken bridge, it's up to the pups to lower them to safety!

programme.title: E206 - The Birth / The Revelation
programme.desc: Young Francois witnesses the birth of Barbapapa. // Barbapapa is a prisoner in a zoo.

programme.title: E103 - The Alebrije Adventure / Let's Get A Paleta
programme.desc: Ale the Alebrije asks Dora for her help! The Alebrije tree is wilting, so it's up to Dora to find its rainbow water. // On a super hot day, everyone wants paleta, but Val's paleta truck is stuck! Dora goes to rescue her and get paletas for everyone.

programme.desc: Several Komians are busy around a large cauldron closely supervised by the High Priestess. Pokou manages to escape with the young boy who had set the trap for the Komian, before saving her.

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place:2025-2026
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Foreigners
programme.desc: Jim, 15, is deeply shaken by the arrival of Neil, his British father whom he hasn't seen in five years. The teenager is about to be adopted by his stepfather, with whom he has formed a true bond. But Neil refuses to give up his parental rights...

programme.title: E23 - Bad Blood
programme.desc: In a rusty car just outside Lusagne, Alex finds the prostate but alive body of a young man who'd gone missing years earlier. An emotional return for friends and family. But, very quickly, Alex finds the story the young man gives of his kidnap-ping and years of absence somewhat unlikely.

programme.title: E4 - Caffeinated Concert Tickets/It's Time/Access Denied/Caveman/Journey To The Bottom Of
programme.desc: Mordecai and Rigby work overtime in order to get tickets to a Fist Pump concert. While working, they drink lots of coffee to keep them active.

programme.title: E4 - Excalibear/Meat House/The Pirate Parrot Polly/Baby Bear Genius/Bug City Sleuths
programme.desc: The Bears visit a medieval vegetable-village and Grizz is convinced he's the rightful king.

programme.title: E82 - Barn Mates/Same Old World/Hit The Diamond
programme.desc: Steven attempts to get two of his close friends to like each other.

programme.title: E21 - Trouble At Smelt Fishing/Lunch Time Is Quiet Time
programme.desc: Traces of the Bobobobobone are detected on fish scales by the lake. When Shiro arrives at the frozen lake, he drills a hole in it and competes with Deca at smelt-fishing.

programme.title: E123 - Squash Me If You Can
programme.desc: Sweetie competes in a cat vs. bird competition but faces pressure to win at all costs. Hamton and Babs go into soccer mom-mode cheering her on, while Plucky, at the Loo Bru, takes over Dizzy’s shift to prove he’s more selfless than Buster.

programme.title: E34 - A. The Promise/The Voice/The Boombox/The Castle/The Tape
programme.desc: Darwin has promised to play video games with Gumball, but there is a Banana Joe-shaped problem...

programme.title: E145 - Frame The Feline / Daffy Traffic Cop Stop: Boating License / Unlucky Strikes/Cro-Mag
programme.desc: Hubie and Bertie risk it all to break into a cheese shop.

programme.title: E94 - The Slap/The Detective/The Fury/The Compilation/The Disaster
programme.desc: Tobias follows every high-five with a butt-slap, so when Gumball doesn't get one he feels insulted. He tries to get Tobias to slap his rear all day, but when it doesn't work he decides they need some enforced one-on-one bro-time to build their relationship up to a butt-slap.

programme.title: E56 - Say Uncle/Reformed
programme.desc: A long lost relative of Steven's comes to town to aid him in unlocking the power of his mother's gem!

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow's trading day.

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia

programme.title: Squawk On The Street
programme.desc: Headquartered live on the floor of the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) where the biggest companies in the world trade, “Squawk On The Street” tracks the action of every stock and gives you access to the treasury, currency and commodity action in real time.

programme.title: Money Movers
programme.desc: “Money Movers” provides investors with real-time analysis of the stories and the people attracting the attention of the markets each day. Capturing the energy of day's early trading, the program includes the breaking news and numbers driving stocks and sectors, helping investors make critical decisions. “Money Movers” anchors speak with the CEOs, government decision-makers and newsmakers who play a relevant role in how money is moving.

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: CNBC's ‘The Exchange' is the newsroom-based program for today's investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today's markets and investors. CNBC's deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.desc: Join us as we take a look at a world of different luxuries each week. In this episode, we get to peek inside the world's most luxurious trains.

programme.title: E5 - Fruit
programme.desc: Michelin starred chef Jason uses beautiful produce from the Middle East to create delicious dishes that have fruit as the hero ingredient-figs, balsamic, and honey, and a salad of orange, carrot, and avocado, with a zesty orange and lime dressing. Jason's guest chef is his own Executive chef in Dubai, who samples some fruity cocktails before creating a delicious lobster and mango dish.

programme.title: TV Patrol Express[Live]
programme.desc: TV Patrol Express, hosted by Jeff Canoy and Denice Dinsay is a quick look at the top stories of the day. A fifteen minute fast-paced newscast, it offers a glimpse of breaking news, stories that developed, and updates to watch out for on TV Patrol for the on-the-go viewer.

programme.title: TV Patrol Live[Live]
programme.desc: ABS-CBN's flagship newscast and the country's leading news program in the past two decades, anchored by the most celebrated news team ever assembled in the history of Philippine broadcasting.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: The Mistress

As secrets unravel and family tensions escalate, the love triangle ignites conflict that tests loyalty, forgiveness, and the search for authentic connection.

programme.desc: Private Military Contractors (PMCs) engage in high-stakes tasks daily, with many skilled Filipino soldiers involved. Incognito follows ex-soldiers on covert missions, blending intense action with themes of honor, love, and redemption.

programme.title: TV Patrol Express[Live]
programme.desc: TV Patrol Express, hosted by Jeff Canoy and Denice Dinsay is a quick look at the top stories of the day. A fifteen minute fast-paced newscast, it offers a glimpse of breaking news, stories that developed, and updates to watch out for on TV Patrol for the on-the-go viewer.

programme.title: TV Patrol Live[Live]
programme.desc: ABS-CBN's flagship newscast and the country's leading news program in the past two decades, anchored by the most celebrated news team ever assembled in the history of Philippine broadcasting.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

E22
programme.desc: 講述在司法不公不義的社會中，地下秘密的士公司「彩虹運輸」存在著一位特殊部隊出身的代表的士司機替一群無法受到法律保護的被害者們找回公理。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 講述一位懷抱著成為名作家夢想的志願生，雖然父親期望他成為像「尹東柱」這樣的劃時代詩人而取名，但現實是只有一身債務的作家志願生陸東柱，和來歷不明、有著特殊能力的少年姜山超越時間的界限一起尋找真相並創造奇蹟的過程。

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 劇情講述一個少女的失蹤交織著無數的謊言和慾望，牽涉其中的七個人遭遇重大事件後發生的故事。這七個人都會為了個人私慾背叛，出賣他人，過著充滿謊言的生活。​

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 講述婦產科醫生雖然看起來擁有財富、名譽和外貌，卻是一個孤獨至極的人物。她從崩潰的家庭中逃離出來，某天遇到了唯一能夠看穿她的孤獨的男人，重新找回家庭關係並成長的故事。

E2 - Sweet Dreams & Goodnight Songs!
programme.desc: Get ready for sweet dreams & goodnight songs! First, Mia giggles with delight as she gathers four of her favorite stuffed animals into bed with her for a fun game of 'Ten in the Bed.' The bedtime fun continues as Maple & Muffin play a game of 'Five Little Monkeys' during their bubble bath. Then, Grandma Panda helps Mia & Bari embark on a fantastic adventure, building a little rocket out of cushions to go on an adventure to the moon!

programme.title: E8 - Relaxing Songs
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E4 - Answering Big Questions!
programme.desc: Blippi is answering some of life's biggest questions! He shrinks down for a night adventure in a mouth to learn the right way to brush teeth from Bill Brushy. Then, he flies up a nose to find out what makes us sneeze! His curiosity continues as he learns how a fly can walk upside down on the ceiling, discovers the artistic process of how spiders make their webs & even becomes a contestant on a game show to learn the difference between fruits & vegetables!

programme.title: E1 - Creative Farm Adventures!
programme.desc: Get ready for some creative farm adventures with Ella! First, Ella brings school to Lellobee City Farm by creating a classroom in the Boogie Barn & teaching all her animal friends. Then, she helps Mei make some delicious jam using fresh strawberries, grapes & blueberries from the farm! The creative day ends with a magical night of stargazing, where Mei points out constellations that look just like the animals on the farm.

programme.title: E6 - Magic, A Blob, A Show & A Bubble!
programme.desc: Join Bubbles for a day of magic, a blob, a show & a bubble! First, Bubbles is excited to watch Pogo's magic show, but her curiosity gets the better of her & she spoils his tricks! Then, she invents a brand new bouncy blob, but it bounces out of control & causes havoc all over the Bodpod! The adventures continue as Bubbles gets stage fright before a big show & tries her best to stop a giant, beautiful bubble from popping.

programme.title: E2 - Nina's Adventures with Friends
programme.desc: Join Nina on some amazing adventures with her friends! When Nina challenges her school friends to a game of soccer, she imagines herself as a true soccer star playing in a giant stadium at the World Cup! Then, she visits Grandpa's farm where she proves to be an ace tractor driver who never leaves her friends behind. From learning to share a new firetruck to going on an epic chase to get back a lost surprise egg, it's always an adventure with Nina!

programme.title: E3 - Let's Sing, Dance and Play!
programme.desc: It's time to sing, dance & play at Lellobee City Farm! The fun starts in the Boogie Barn where Grandma Mei teaches Ella, Rishi & all the cute animals a brand new alphabet song. Then, it's time to get active as Mei leads a high-energy exercise dance for all the kids & animals! The day ends with a fun 'who can make the biggest splash?' competition in the inflatable swimming pool, where even Pablo the pig & Heidi the horse join in!

programme.title: E1 - When Baby Daniel Causes Total Mayhem!
programme.desc: Get ready for some total mayhem caused by Baby Daniel! The chaos begins when Daniel finds the remote to control Arpo, turning the robot babysitter into everything from an elephant to a bird! Then, Arpo is tasked with cleaning the kitchen, but Daniel just wants to play, making an even bigger mess. From getting covered in mud to being extra noisy while Daddy is trying to sleep, Baby Daniel keeps Arpo on his toes in this fun-filled, chaotic adventure!

programme.title: E8 - Relaxing Songs

programme.title: House Of Lies
programme.desc: House of Lies is an intense, family-centered drama about two mothers who face off against each other. Shaped by painful pasts, they clash in a fierce battle marked by betrayal, hidden family secrets, and a fight for survival.

programme.title: House Of Lies
programme.desc: House of Lies is an intense, family-centered drama about two mothers who face off against each other. Shaped by painful pasts, they clash in a fierce battle marked by betrayal, hidden family secrets, and a fight for survival.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: 24 Oras
programme.desc: Gives an up-to-the minute news here and around the world.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

programme.title: Project A
programme.desc: This is Hong Kong at the turn of the century. The South China Sea is crawling with smugglers, cut-throats and pirates and none is more successful than the gang led by the notorious pirate Lo. Government forces invariably lose to Lo. Finally the Government looks the other way whenever Lo is around. Young seaman Jackie Chan, so far better known for his bar room fights, resigns from the Marine Force. He plans to stage a personal vendetta against Lo. Jackie gets the help of Samo Hung, little knowing Samo has his own axe to grind. Jackie and Samo suffer an inglorious drubbing in the hands of Lo. Jackie, now completely incensed, decides to don the uniform once again. He finds young commander Yuen Biao sympathetic to his cause but adamant against his antics...

programme.title: Project A
programme.desc: This is Hong Kong at the turn of the century. The South China Sea is crawling with smugglers, cut-throats and pirates and none is more successful than the gang led by the notorious pirate Lo. Government forces invariably lose to Lo. Finally the Government looks the other way whenever Lo is around. Young seaman Jackie Chan, so far better known for his bar room fights, resigns from the Marine Force. He plans to stage a personal vendetta against Lo. Jackie gets the help of Samo Hung, little knowing Samo has his own axe to grind. Jackie and Samo suffer an inglorious drubbing in the hands of Lo. Jackie, now completely incensed, decides to don the uniform once again. He finds young commander Yuen Biao sympathetic to his cause but adamant against his antics...

programme.title: Fury
programme.desc: Chick, Chi-to and Lucky are blood brothers. Chi-to's cousin, Chan, acts as a go-between and arranges a trafficking of counterfeit U.S. notes between Chi-to's group and the local triad society in Taiwan. However, Chan is a double-cross by informing the police of the trafficking. At the ambush, police injure Lucky and arrest him, while the rest have a narrow escape and land on a boat back to Hong Kong. On their return, Chan deliberately kills Lucky's wife Ngao and shots Chick into the sea. Lucky is free from jail and returns to Hong Kong five years later. Touchingly reunited with Chi-to, Lucky is told that Chick was dead and Ngao was disappeared during their run away. Meantime, Chan assigns his mistress Elsa to keep an eye on Lucky...

programme.title: Fury
programme.desc: Chick, Chi-to and Lucky are blood brothers. Chi-to's cousin, Chan, acts as a go-between and arranges a trafficking of counterfeit U.S. notes between Chi-to's group and the local triad society in Taiwan. However, Chan is a double-cross by informing the police of the trafficking. At the ambush, police injure Lucky and arrest him, while the rest have a narrow escape and land on a boat back to Hong Kong. On their return, Chan deliberately kills Lucky's wife Ngao and shots Chick into the sea. Lucky is free from jail and returns to Hong Kong five years later. Touchingly reunited with Chi-to, Lucky is told that Chick was dead and Ngao was disappeared during their run away. Meantime, Chan assigns his mistress Elsa to keep an eye on Lucky...

programme.desc: Rocky Balboa proudly holds the world heavyweight boxing championship, but a new challenger has stepped forward: Drago, a six-foot-six, 261-pound fighter who has the backing of the Soviet Union.

programme.title: The Other Guys
programme.desc: Two mismatched New York City detectives seize an opportunity to step up like the city's top cops, whom they idolize, only things don't quite go as planned.
